meta.title: Water Resources Information System (SIRH) — iCarto
meta.description: Integrated digital platform for water authorities to manage permits, billing and GIS analysis. Proven in Mozambique and Eswatini.

hero.title: SIRH:
hero.description: The integrated platform to manage the full lifecycle of water permits, professionalise billing and effectively engage with users—all powered by native GIS analysis for efficient water administration.
hero.screenshotAlt: SIRH operation areas map with GIS layers and permit overlays
hero.placeholderHint: Replace this container with your high-resolution SIRH application screenshot (16:10 aspect ratio recommended).

proven.title: Proven at National Level
proven.subtitle: A robust, multi-country solution backing technical decisions daily.
proven.banner: Over 10 years improving water user and permit management

proven.resultsDescription: Documented outcomes from our international implementations.
proven.resultsFootnote: Based on implementation experience in Mozambique since 2018.

resultsItems.title: Increased number of permits managed annually

challenges.title: Overcoming the Challenges of Fragmented Management
challenges.description: Is your institution struggling with outdated methodologies and scattered information? The transition to SIRH turns technical hurdles into automated workflows.
challenges.warningText: Paper systems introduce massive data friction and block legal cost-recovery mandates from public administrations.

items.problem: Information scattered across paper ledgers or localized spreadsheets.

items.note: Up to 90% errors in paper systems
items.problem: Different departments hold contradictory license and billing records.
Manual calculations and manual processing of license renewals.
Inefficient fee collections due to tracking blockages.

capabilities.title: Core System Capabilities
capabilities.subtitle: Designed for the technical reality of water managers and engineers.

items.title: Standardised Registry
items.description: Unified procedures for water user and permit registration, adaptable to any regulatory context.

items.title: Native GIS Mapping
items.description: Visualise operation areas, crops, and water abstraction or discharge points on dynamic maps.

items.title: Document Automation
items.description: Instant generation and printing of official licences and invoices in PDF format.

items.title: Guided Workflows
items.description: Comprehensive status monitoring of applications and renewals through customisable institutional steps.

sustainability.title: Financial Sustainability and Cost Recovery
sustainability.description: SIRH is an investment that pays for itself by professionalising the billing cycle.

benefits.title: Revenue Increase
benefits.description: Proven growth in financial capacity through better tracking and illegal water use regularisation.

benefits.title: Flexible Billing
benefits.description: Automated generation of invoices based on water use, permit issuance, or multiple activities per area.

benefits.title: Batch Processing
benefits.description: Efficiently generate and manage invoices in batches by basin or billing frequency.

benefits.title: Debt Management
benefits.description: Integrated monitoring of payments, penalties, and outstanding balances.

ecosystem.title: Scalable Ecosystem: The Evolution of Your Digital Strategy
ecosystem.description: SIRH is designed to grow alongside your institution. Once core management is consolidated, the system can expand through advanced tools to further digitalise field operations and public transparency.

modules.title: Digital Customer Portal
modules.description: A fully digital service channel to improve communication and transparency with water users.

features.label: Self-Service Access
features.text: Customers can check permit details, authorized consumption, and validity in real-time.

features.label: Status Monitoring
features.text: Users can track the progress of their permit applications and invoice payments online.

features.label: Full Synchronisation
features.text: Data is updated automatically from the central SIRH database.

modules.title: SIRH Mobile
modules.description: A dedicated application for field teams to collect, update, and validate data on-site.

features.label: Paperless Fieldwork
features.text: Eliminate manual forms and reduce errors by entering data directly into the system.

features.label: Real-time Reliability
features.text: Information collected in the field is synchronised instantly with the central registry.

features.label: Improved Quality
features.text: High-consistency data collection including photos and precise GPS coordinates for operation areas.

methodology.title: Our Difference: Collaborative Implementation that leads to Technology Ownership
methodology.description: We don't just deliver software; we ensure it is organically integrated into your institution's daily operations.

items.title: Multidisciplinary Co-design
items.description: We establish cross-institutional working groups to design the system alongside the end-users, ensuring it fits your specific workflows and needs.

items.title: Phased Growth Strategy
items.description: Implementation is structured in three strategic phases (Foundation, Advanced Procedures, and Billing) to reduce risk and allow progressive institutional adaptation.

items.title: Institutional Strengthening
items.description: We dedicate 40–50% of the project effort to co-design workshops, training and capacity building.

items.title: Open-Source Philosophy
items.description: Total ownership of code and data by the institution, eliminating vendor lock-in and high licensing costs.

contact.title: Ready to modernise your water administration?
contact.description: iCarto is your technology partner. We specialise in supporting water authorities with limited resources to overcome technological constraints.
contact.emailHint: Contact our team for technical questions, budget estimations or proposal documentation.
